mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CARD_INPUT ci LEFT JOIN CARD_OUTPUT co ON ci.TSTM_YMD = co.TSTM_YMD AND ci.TSTM_NO = co.TSTM_NO AND ci.BRCD = co.BRCD WHERE ci.BRCD is not null

SELECT
FROM CARD_INPUT ci LEFT JOIN CARD_OUTPUT co ON ci.TSTM_YMD = co.TSTM_YMD AND ci.TSTM_NO = co.TSTM_NO AND ci.BRCD = co.BRCD WHERE ci.BRCD is not null
ORDER BY ci.FRRG_TS
ASC
DESC
mapper.sql: ci.HDQR_BOB_DCD , ci.CDN , ci.FRRG_TS , ci.AMSL_AMT , ci.AFST_NM , ci.BZDY_YN, co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON , co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON , co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON , ci.TSTM_YMD , ci.TSTM_NO , ci.BRCD
